_meta.description: SG-2 Phase 2d ranked domain tables. Mined from the 16 golden ideal Style Guides in docs/style_guide/golden. colours_by_role is keyed <temperature>_<lane> where lane is one of the three aesthetic registers plus the distinct water_dominant lane (3 temperatures x 4 lanes = 12), mirroring the four texture lanes. textures is keyed by lane. accessory_specs is keyed <register>_<orientation>_<finishLane> (3 x 3 x 3 = 27).
_meta.hard_rules: British English; spellings follow the golden guides; no em dashes, en dashes, or double hyphens in any prose string; concrete nouns over adjective filler.

quietLuxury.name: Cashmere
quietLuxury.useCase: knitwear and winter layers that compress and bounce back

quietLuxury.name: Full-grain leather
quietLuxury.useCase: bags, shoes, and belts that mould to your life and patinate

quietLuxury.name: Brushed wool and tweed
quietLuxury.useCase: tailored coats and blazers that hold clean lines for years

quietLuxury.name: Silk
quietLuxury.useCase: blouses and linings that add fluid, effortless movement

quietLuxury.name: Suede
quietLuxury.useCase: shoes and accessories with quiet matt texture

quietLuxury.name: Fine merino
quietLuxury.useCase: base layers soft against the skin and resilient through washes

quietLuxury.name: Linen
quietLuxury.useCase: warmer-weather pieces whose natural wrinkle reads as authentic

boldExpression.name: Crisp cotton poplin

boldExpression.name: Sharp wool twill

boldExpression.name: Patent leather

boldExpression.name: Heavy silk satin

boldExpression.name: Techno gabardine

boldExpression.name: High-shine taffeta
boldExpression.useCase: evening pieces that bounce light and cut a clear silhouette

boldExpression.name: Polished calfskin
boldExpression.useCase: footwear and accessories with a slick, radiant surface

boldExpression.name: Leather
boldExpression.useCase: jackets and trousers that hold a silhouette like a drawn blade

versatileAdaptive.name: Crisp cotton poplin
versatileAdaptive.useCase: shirting with clean architectural boundaries and pure separation

versatileAdaptive.name: Fine ribbed merino
versatileAdaptive.useCase: close-to-body base layers with sharp lines and easy movement

versatileAdaptive.name: Worsted wool
versatileAdaptive.useCase: trousers that drape cleanly and resist creasing through a long day

versatileAdaptive.name: Technical nylon
versatileAdaptive.useCase: lightweight mobile outerwear that blocks wind and weighs little

versatileAdaptive.name: Lightweight gabardine
versatileAdaptive.useCase: transitional jackets with rigid structure and no heavy drag

versatileAdaptive.name: Matt silk
versatileAdaptive.useCase: a frictionless fluid layer added without bulk

versatileAdaptive.name: Crisp linen
versatileAdaptive.useCase: breathable separation over fluid drapes in warmer weather

water_dominant.name: Washed silk
water_dominant.useCase: slips and blouses softened until the sheen turns to candlelight

water_dominant.name: Cloud-soft lambswool
water_dominant.useCase: jumpers and cardigans that shelter without weight

water_dominant.name: Heavy silk crepe
water_dominant.useCase: dresses that trace the body with fluid, hidden depth

water_dominant.name: Boiled wool
water_dominant.useCase: unstructured protective coats that stay soft at every edge

water_dominant.name: Brushed alpaca
water_dominant.useCase: enveloping winter coats and oversized cardigans

water_dominant.name: Fluid modal jersey
water_dominant.useCase: base layers that follow the body without ever gripping it

water_dominant.name: Brushed cotton flannel
water_dominant.useCase: shirts and loungewear that feel like a remembered embrace

water_dominant.name: Cupro
water_dominant.useCase: soft shirting and fluid trousers with a liquid tonal drape

categories.reason: a substantial bag holds its shape and develops a patina that outlasts synthetics
a loosely worn scarf adds the fluid movement structured coats need
an architectural belt does a structural job rather than a decorative one
one dense piece worn close to the skin supplies the touch of quiet depth

a matt body with one polished clasp states the mixed finish in a single object
